response.justification: Wei is a highly experienced software engineer, but their background is primarily in full-stack web development (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang) rather than the required C++. They possess less than a year of professional C++ experience from nearly a decade ago, which falls significantly short of the 5-10 years of mandatory C++ on Windows required for this role. Additionally, they lack the necessary Capital Markets or Fixed Income domain expertise and enterprise SQL Server/Oracle experience.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) with a strong focus on testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship.
Proven ability to lead projects and work at a Staff Engineer level across various technology stacks.
Some exposure to the financial sector through previous work at a wealthtech company (RIDE Capital).
concerns: Severely lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience on Windows (only ~7 months from 2015).
No demonstrated domain expertise in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income.
Lacks required experience with enterprise relational databases like SQL Server or Oracle, focusing instead on MongoDB and MySQL.
